name: SEC-climate-disclosure-final-rule
description: U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission publicerar final rule om climate-related disclosures för publika bolag. Final rule = bindande regulation. US jurisdiction. Med deadline → action_required.
beforeHtml:
U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission

Final Rules

When the Commission issues a final rule, the effective date and compliance dates are specified in the Federal Register release. Below are recent final rules.

2025-2026

Release No. 33-11260 — Amendments to Form PF
Adopted: 2025-10-22 · Effective: 2026-03-12
Release No. 34-98912 — Short Position and Short Activity Reporting
Adopted: 2025-07-14 · Effective: 2025-11-01
Release No. IC-34960 — Money Market Fund Reforms
Adopted: 2024-07-12 · Effective: 2024-10-02
afterHtml:
U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission

Final Rules

When the Commission issues a final rule, the effective date and compliance dates are specified in the Federal Register release. Below are recent final rules.

2025-2026

Release No. 33-11412 — Enhancement and Standardization of Climate-Related Disclosures for Investors

The Commission has adopted a final rule requiring registrants to disclose climate-related information in their registration statements and periodic reports, including material climate-related risks, governance of climate-related risks, impact on strategy, financial statement effects, and scope 1 and 2 greenhouse gas emissions for large accelerated and accelerated filers.

Adopted: 2026-04-10
Effective date: 2026-07-01
Compliance date (large accelerated filers): fiscal years beginning on or after 2027-01-01
Compliance date (accelerated filers): fiscal years beginning on or after 2028-01-01
Release No. 33-11260 — Amendments to Form PF
Adopted: 2025-10-22 · Effective: 2026-03-12
Release No. 34-98912 — Short Position and Short Activity Reporting
Adopted: 2025-07-14 · Effective: 2025-11-01
Release No. IC-34960 — Money Market Fund Reforms
Adopted: 2024-07-12 · Effective: 2024-10-02
